cards.name: Hermes Favor
cards.description: A breeze nudges you forward.

cards.name: Hermes Favor
cards.description: The wind follows your stride.

cards.name: Hermes Favor
cards.description: The wind races beside you, struggling to keep up.

cards.name: Hermes Favor
cards.description: You outrun the whisper of the wind itself.

cards.name: Iron Defence
cards.description: Your stance steadies against the world.

cards.name: Iron Defence
cards.description: Stone settles into your bones.

cards.name: Iron Defence
cards.description: Steel seems to guard your skin.

cards.name: Iron Defence
cards.description: You stand like an unbreakable fortress.

cards.name: Switch It Up
cards.description: Fate bends reluctantly. The deck stirs once more.

cards.name: Revitalize
cards.description: Death loosens its grip.

cards.name: Revitalize
cards.description: Death's grasp falters.

cards.name: Revitalize
cards.description: Death retreats from your breath.

cards.name: Sharpen
cards.description: Your weapon stirs with quiet hunger.
cards.effect: Increase Damage by 8% and Critical Chance by 5%.

cards.name: Sharpen
cards.description: Steel answers your will.
cards.effect: Increase Damage by 12% and Critical Chance by 8%.

cards.name: Sharpen
cards.description: Each strike grows deadlier than the last.
cards.effect: Increase Damage by 15% and Critical Chance by 10%.

cards.name: Sharpen
cards.description: Your blade thirsts for victory.
cards.effect: Increase Damage by 20% and Critical Chance by 15%.

cards.name: Berserker
cards.description: Pain sharpens your focus.
cards.effect: Increase Critical Chance by 10% below 50% HP.

cards.name: Berserker
cards.description: Blood and fury guide your aim.
cards.effect: Increase Critical Chance by 20% below 50% HP.

cards.name: Berserker
cards.description: On the brink of death, every strike is lethal.
cards.effect: Increase Critical Chance by 35% below 50% HP.

cards.name: Fleeting Step
cards.description: Your step blurs through space, the void waits less between surges.

cards.name: Fleeting Step
cards.description: Each stride pierces the void, the distance between motions shrinks.

cards.name: Surefooted
cards.description: Danger bows to your passage, even hidden blades respect your stride.
cards.effect: Reduce damage taken from traps by 20%.

cards.name: Surefooted
cards.description: The earth itself shields you, traps falter before your path.
cards.effect: Reduce damage taken from traps by 35%.

cards.name: Deep Vitality
cards.description: The world may strike, but you endure longer.

cards.name: Deep Vitality
cards.description: Your strength grows, blows bruise but do not break you.

cards.name: Deep Vitality
cards.description: Vitality surges, the body resists what once would fell it.

cards.name: Deep Vitality
cards.description: Your heart beats like iron, even fate itself struggles to harm you.

cards.name: Hand Of Fate
cards.description: Fate leans slightly in your favor, each strike finds its mark.

cards.name: Hand Of Fate
cards.description: The threads of destiny twist to your hand, your strikes almost cannot miss.

cards.name: Sundering Blow
cards.description: When your strikes land true, they carve deep.

cards.name: Sundering Blow
cards.description: Your strikes rend the world, no defense can stand before them.
